title: RNG bug bounty token rn - degen alert! 1 eth reward if you break it before next week. tbh we're all

audit.reason: Incomplete work and lack of comprehensive analysis
audit.improvements: The work submitted is incomplete. The user identified some vulnerabilities in the random number generation logic but failed to provide a complete demonstration of an exploit, including not finishing or adequately explaining the hypothetical simulation. Additionally, no specific recommendations or mitigation strategies were outlined to improve the RNG mechanism. To increase the quality, the report should include a detailed analysis with complete examples of exploits, potential solutions, and consider using more secure RNG approaches like oracles.
